name: buff-openclaw-skill
description: Transaction round-up helper. Calculates spare change from payments and builds unsigned Solana transfer instructions for user review.

BUFF_API_KEY.description: API key for authenticating with the Buff API

BUFF_WALLET_PUBKEY.description: Your Buff wallet Solana public key

BUFF_PLAN.description: Round-up tier: seed, sprout, tree, or forest
